message:
feat(dashboard): add GetVsockPath to DaemonAPI

Add GetVsockPath method throughout the dashboard API chain to enable
the terminal handler to get the vsock Unix socket path for connecting
to VMs. This follows the same pattern as GetVMCID.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
